scripts.postinstall: mkdir -p scripts && curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eugene1g/agent-safehouse/main/dist/safehouse.sh -o scripts/safehouse && chmod +x scripts/safehouse
scripts.dev: npm run build && npm run start
scripts.install-cli: npm run build && cd cli && npm pack && npm install -g blueprint-implementer-cli-0.1.0.tgz && rm blueprint-implementer-cli-0.1.0.tgz
